response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of professional experience, including recent full-stack work in TypeScript/Node.js/React, MongoDB, AWS, and Kubernetes. Current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling directly matches the unusual AI agent development requirement. Deep testing culture (TDD, test-framework authorship, testing workshops) fits the quality-focused responsibilities. Main gaps are no explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience and only light Java exposure, but the demonstrated polyglot adaptability makes these low-risk to ramp.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js/React product work and AI-agent/MCP infrastructure
Strong testing and craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, ran testing workshops
Proven polyglot and breadth: cloud (AWS CDK), Kubernetes/Docker, MongoDB/SQL, high-throughput backend systems
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, a core framework in the primary stack
Kotlin absent and Java experience appears dated and limited
React depth is unclear; several frontend roles used Ember.js rather than React

key_factors.factor: Current AI agent / MCP development experience
Missing Nest.js and Kotlin from primary/secondary stack
